calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge Pro Tem: William Rauch Department 303B Clerk: Anna Redigonda
Crt.Rpt.: Susan K. Crozier

Case came on calendar for unlawful detainer settlement conference this date.

Arnold Walter Evje, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff
Defendant Jeanne Bulick-Forter appeared Pro Per
Mr. Shah, Esq. representing Defendant.

Case assigned to Department 303B for settlement conference.
Case settles on the record.
Stip to entry of Judgment for Plaintiff against Defendant.
Plaintiff to receive restitution and possession of premises located at 1250 Pine Street #5.
Back rent and damages in the amount of $2,693.44 for Septemer 01,03 thru December 31, 03; attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $1,200. Writ of possession, no stay.
However, Defendant may remain in premises if she agrees to pay $2,693.44 to plaintiff on or before 5:00 p.m. 11/07/03. Also costs in the amount of $1,200 starting with payment on December 1, 2003 and equal payments for the next consecutive 23 months. Contract rent due 1st of every month. Three day grace period
